session.title: Designing a Test Plan to Detect Unauthorized AI Assistance in an eLearning Ecosystem
session.topic_summary: The session scoped and structured a comprehensive detection strategy for unauthorized AI-assisted task completion across exams, assignments, proctored quizzes, forums, and browsing. It translated risk outcomes into measurable detection hypotheses, telemetry requirements, test scenarios, SIEM analytics, and control validations tailored to username/password, CAC/PIV, and mobile web token authentication.

competencies.name: Learning Data & Analytics Architecture
frameworks: ATD Talent Development Capability Model: Data & Analytics

competencies.name: Security Engineering for eLearning
frameworks: SFIA: SCTY, PENT, PENT (lite detection design)

axes.label: Telemetry Design
axes.description: Definition of client/server signals and feasibility for capture.

axes.label: Risk Mapping
axes.description: Clarity connecting behaviors to academic, privacy, and system risks.

axes.label: Test Rigor
axes.description: Breadth and specificity of scenarios, controls, and pass/fail criteria.

axes.label: Operationalization
axes.description: Queries, alerts, and playbooks to run detections at scale.

axes.label: Policy & Ethics
axes.description: Privacy, consent, accessibility, and appeals pathways.

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Identify Risk Areas
blooms_progression.description: The learner enumerated unacceptable outcomes (academic integrity, PII leakage, vulnerabilities, credential risks).

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Frame the Detection Problem
blooms_progression.description: They clarified scope to encompass exams, assignments, proctoring, forums, and browsing, showing comprehension of contexts of use.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Apply Controls to Context
blooms_progression.description: The plan linked concrete telemetry to activities (paste size, dwell time, DNS to AI domains, headless indicators) for practical tests.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Hypotheses & Signal Correlation
blooms_progression.description: Detection hypotheses mapped signals to outcomes and auth methods, including behavioral baselines and correlation logic.

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Define Pass/Fail & Thresholds
blooms_progression.description: Explicit pass/fail criteria, target precision, and false-positive handling demonstrate evaluative judgment.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Design End-to-End Runbook
blooms_progression.description: A bespoke test matrix, analytics examples, and an execution roadmap were created to implement the strategy.

timeline.title: Problem Framing
timeline.description: Learner states need to detect AI assistance post-authentication across multiple auth methods.

timeline.title: Risk Declaration
timeline.description: Learner lists unacceptable outcomes: academic integrity loss, PII leakage, system and credential risks.

timeline.title: Scope Confirmation
timeline.description: Activities in scope established: exams, graded assignments, proctored quizzes, forums, browsing.

timeline.title: Test Plan Drafted
timeline.description: Comprehensive plan produced with detection objectives, signals, scenarios, and pass/fail criteria.

timeline.title: Operationalization Guidance
timeline.description: SIEM analytics examples, prevention control tests, and a 6–8 week execution roadmap provided.

employer_value.title: Protects Assessment Integrity
employer_value.description: Demonstrated capability to design telemetry-driven detections that flag unauthorized AI use with defined thresholds and workflows.

employer_value.title: Builds Actionable Analytics
employer_value.description: Translates risks into SIEM-ready signals, queries, and dashboards to support rapid incident triage and continuous tuning.

employer_value.title: Operational Readiness
employer_value.description: Delivered a pragmatic runbook with test matrices, control validations, and milestone planning for cross-functional execution.

portfolio.title: AI-Assisted Misuse Detection Test Plan for LMS
portfolio.subtitle: SELF-DIRECTED · APPLIED · DOCUMENTED

meta.notes: Scores reflect a concise yet substantive design session emphasizing analysis and evaluation over extended application. Engagement and meta-cognition are moderate due to limited back-and-forth and minimal reflective statements. ROI estimates benchmark against comparable security & assessment integrity workshops.
